name: Apple My Love
original_name: Apple ถึงเธอ...ที่รัก
overview: After getting her vision back, Kris sees a person in her dreams, but when she wakes up, the only thing she can remember are a pair of eyes. She starts drawing them to help her remember, but when she sees Karn for the first time, she recognizes that the pair in her dreams and Karn's are one and the same...

trailers.title: OFFICIAL TRAILER | APPLE ถึงเธอ...ที่รัก
